reason: Experience privacy verdict human_required: private_material_detected, feishu_channel_team_review_first

details.redacted_summary: - **根因示例**：确认是空间/内存占满（用户反馈为“内存满了”），清理 `/tmp` 后重启恢复。 - **处理**：若费用正常且不是休眠/手动停止，检查磁盘/`/tmp` 空间；清理后重启实例。 ### Cron `sessionTarget: "main"` Bug (2026-02-27) - All cron jobs with `sessionTarget: "main"` + `payload.kind: "systemEvent"` fail with 400 error - Root cause: Framework doesn't save actual main session key, stores literal "main" string - Workaround: Use `sessionTarget: "isolated"` + `payload.kind: "agentTurn"` + `delivery` config - Log location: `[REDACTED_PATH] ## Feishu Group Reply Convention - In Feishu topic/thread-style group conversations, reply under the user's topic/message instead of sending a separate standalone group message. - When context is clearly a reply chain, prefer `replyTo` / thread-aware replies to keep the conversation attached to the original
